literal: to take additional risks after having success or good fortune

relabelled_senses.definition: to force oneself through a crowd, obstacle, or confined space by physically pushing; to advance assertively or persistently in order to make progress or reach a position.

literal: no literal meaning
to spend money freely or to celebrate in a lavish or extravagant manner
to extend or push the limits of what is possible or acceptable
to be dead; to have died and been buried
to attempt to force water to flow uphill
to apply a superficial or temporary remedy to a serious problem
to give someone a suggestion or idea indirectly
to reduce the enjoyment or excitement of an event or situation
to terminate or bring a stop to something permanently
to insult or show disrespect to someone

relabelled_senses.definition: Used as an imperative to tell someone to be quiet or stop talking.

literal: no literal meaning
to bring something to an end or halt an activity
to earn enough money to support oneself
to create physical or figurative distance from another person
to record or designate someone or something by a particular name or category
to register or schedule someone or something for an event or purpose
to attribute an event or result to a particular cause
to create tangible physical changes that alter the status quo
to earn money or provide basic means to support oneself
